name: Crockpot Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the pork chops to taste with salt and pepper.
2. Place the seasoned pork chops in the crockpot.
3. Arrange the peaches on top of the pork chops.
4. Pour the mixture over the peaches.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 4-6 hours, turning off the heat after the cooking time is complete.
